publications.title: Curious Shorts: Curiosity-Driven Exploration and Learning on Short-Form Video Platforms
publications.citation: Tan, F.F., Ram, A., Messerschmidt, A.M., Dissanayake, H.A., and Nanayakkara, S.C. 2025. Curious Shorts: Curiosity-Driven Exploration and Learning on Short-Form Video Platforms. Accepted to the Proceedings of the CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI ’25).
